utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as implied by their labels: 
- property: includes selected property with details (address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, features) and price — fully specified. 
- financing: includes a financing solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, arrangement fee) — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, list of services, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (coverage, services, insurance, cost) — fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (package name, list of services, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- total_budget: includes a complete cost breakdown (property cost, down payment, service fees, optional updates, remaining funds, monthly payment) — sufficiently detailed and itemized. 
Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.
